coordinate_convention.y: enclosure lower edge to upper edge, 0..60; equals 60 - PCB baseline y_from_top
coordinate_convention.z: top/bottom cover mating plane is 0; top cover is negative Z and bottom enclosure is positive Z

method.exact_geometry_note: BREP face inventory is measured from frozen STEP inputs.
method.interpretation_note: Functional names are explicitly confidence-labelled because STEP has no feature history.

curated_features.evidence: Four STEP screw axes exactly match the PCB centers (5,5), (5,55), (125,5), (125,55).
Bottom STEP contains four coaxial r=3.5 and r=1.5 cylindrical face pairs at the PCB hole centers.
curated_features.pending_verification: STEP geometry shows nominal diameter only; intended screw standard, thread-forming fit and print shrink compensation are not encoded.

curated_features.evidence: The four mounting bosses terminate at z=1.6 while the cover mating plane is z=0; this equals the reference 1.6 mm PCB thickness.
curated_features.pending_verification: Confirm with a real assembled unit or CAD assembly; STEP has no named PCB datum.

curated_features.evidence: Dominant planar faces occur at z=12.6 and z=14.6; the support plane is z=1.6.
Four 3x3 mm rib groups bound a 76x46 mm central-right rectangle and rise 6 mm from the inner floor.
curated_features.pending_verification: The STEP has no feature name. Treat 76x46x6 mm only as a candidate battery envelope, not a selected cell size; wire exit, adhesive, protection PCB and swelling allowance remain unknown.

curated_features.evidence: Seven 2 mm high rounded apertures traverse z=12.6..14.6; the reference assembly image shows the acoustic grille in this end region.
Two diagonally opposed 4x4 mm post groups flank the grille and contain r=1 mm cylindrical faces.
curated_features.pending_verification: No speaker model is embedded. The geometry suggests a roughly 25 mm class speaker region and does not establish fit for the planned 40 mm speaker.

curated_features.evidence: A rounded opening is centered at x=65,y≈3.6 and aligns with PCB USB1 after the PCB Y axis is mapped into enclosure coordinates.
curated_features.pending_verification: Confirm the actual connector insertion direction and accessible clearance with the assembled reference or a fit print.

curated_features.evidence: The bottom STEP rectangular edge opening aligns in X with SW1 and crosses the y=59..61 wall.
The beveled long-edge opening is centered near CARD1 in X and is distinct from the USB1-aligned aperture.
Four planar aperture walls span the full 3 mm cover thickness.
Cylinder/plane centers coincide with KEY1..KEY6, SW2 and LED2 after PCB-to-case Y conversion.
Four r=1.5 cylindrical faces traverse the top cover.
No aperture in either STEP was found directly aligned to PCB microphone U7 at enclosure x=15.968,y=11.2722.
curated_features.pending_verification: Inspect the real unit and acoustic path; the design may intentionally couple the microphone through another cavity or shared opening.
